message:
fix(fwc): distinguish absent vs explicit-false event capabilities in host metadata

Change host_live_boolean_field to accept Option<bool> so explicit false
is Known(false) instead of Unknown. Add host_live_event_field inspecting
event_caps presence: if event_caps exists with streaming/replay both
false, report Known(false) rather than Unknown. Only report Unknown when
event_caps is absent AND events list is empty.

Add tests for explicit-false event_caps preservation in show and
discovered-connector paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
